channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260320)
item.description:
What's New

fix: disable marked text for SecurityAgent to prevent duplicate chars in password fields

  • Add isSecureTextField() to detect com.apple.SecurityAgent
  • Update shouldUseMarkedText() to return false for secure text fields
  • AXSecureTextField returns NSNotFound for selectedRange(), causing

insert instead of replace on commitComposition

  • Bump version

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
